promotion_expired: Promotion code has expired or is not yet active
promotion_wrong_restaurant: Promotion code does not apply to this restaurant
promotion_first_order_only: Promotion code is for first orders only
promotion_max_per_user: You have already used this promotion code {max} times
promotion_device_blocked: Device has used more than {max} promotion codes in the last hour
promotion_fixed_cannot_stack: Fixed discount codes cannot be combined with other codes
promotion_one_per_type: Only one code per promotion type is allowed
order_cannot_cancel: Cannot cancel order in current status
order_already_completed: Order is already completed, cannot cancel
order_processing_cannot_cancel: Order is being processed by the restaurant and cannot be cancelled. Please contact support.
order_driver_picked_up: Order has been picked up by the driver, cannot be cancelled by the restaurant
order_cancel_reason_required: Restaurant must provide a reason for cancellation
